website.header.tagline: India's Trusted Catering Directory · 10,000+ Happy Customers
website.footer.blurb: India's trusted directory for finding top-rated catering services. We bring the best flavors to your special occasions.
website.home.heroSubtitleWithStatsAfterCount: hosts who used Bharat Catering to compare menus, cities, and caterer profiles—then book with confidence.
website.home.heroSubtitleDefault: Bharat Catering connects hosts with verified-style caterer listings, published menus, and quotes across India.
website.home.catalogApiUnavailable: Catalog API unavailable — ensure Nest is running on port 4000.
website.home.marquee: POPULAR DISHES • TOP CATERERS • PREMIUM SERVICE • BEST DEALS •
website.home.categoriesApiError: Categories could not be loaded. Check that the catalog API is running on port 4000.
website.home.howItWorksTitle: So How Does Bharat Catering Process Work?
website.home.stepSearchBody: Find the best caterers in your city based on your specific event requirements.
website.home.stepQuotesBody: Receive detailed pricing and menu options from multiple top-rated providers.
website.home.stepHireBody: Compare reviews, taste their food, and finalize the one that fits your needs.
website.home.stepEnjoyBody: Relax and enjoy your event while the caterers handle the delicious food.
website.home.packagesSubtitle: Grow on Bharat Catering with a profile guests can trust — from your first published listing to hands-on partner support for larger teams.
website.home.planStarterBlurb: Create your account, verify your email, and publish a professional profile on the directory.
website.home.planStarterPerk1: Appear in marketplace search by city & service type
website.home.planStarterPerk2: Business name, story, and contact-ready profile
website.home.planStarterPerk3: Email verification before you go live
website.home.planWorkspaceBlurb: Use your caterer workspace to keep menus, gallery, and categories polished as you scale.
website.home.planWorkspacePerk1: Business hub: profile, gallery, and service categories
website.home.planWorkspacePerk2: Publish the details hosts compare before they enquire
website.home.planWorkspacePerk3: Built for teams updating menus and photos often
website.home.planPartnerBlurb: Multi-location brands, high-volume kitchens, or bespoke onboarding — we align with your ops team.
website.home.planPartnerPerk2: Support for multi-brand or multi-city rollouts
website.home.planPartnerPerk3: Commercial terms tailored to your footprint
website.home.packagesFootnotePrefix: Final fees for food and service stay between you and your clients. These packages are about your
website.home.packagesHireLink: Looking to hire a caterer? Browse the directory.
website.home.packagesCompareLink: Full yearly plans, feature table & how to choose
website.home.trustSubtitle: We connect you with the most reliable, hygienic, and highly-rated catering services across India. Quality food for quality moments.
website.home.testimonialQuote: Finding a caterer for our corporate event was a breeze. The quality of food and service was exceptional. Highly recommended platform!
website.home.blogApiUnavailable: Insights will appear here once the blog API is available (run npm run migration:run in catering-backend).
website.caterers.listing.resultsShowing: Showing {count} caterer{plural} found for your search
website.caterers.listing.tryAdjusting: Try widening your search or reset filters to see more listings.
website.caterers.listing.loadErrorBody: Start the API on port 4000 and ensure the database is migrated, then refresh.
website.caterers.detail.inquiryTermsPrefix: By clicking send, you agree to our
website.caterers.detail.writeReviewHint: Share your experience (public, not verified purchases).
website.caterers.detail.aboutPlaceholder: {name} is a catering partner on Bharat Catering. Complete your profile in the workspace to add a full story here.
website.caterers.detail.noReviewsYet: No reviews yet — be the first.
website.caterers.detail.profileNotFoundBody: This caterer may be unpublished or the link is incorrect.
website.auth.shellTitle: Grow Your Catering Business With Us
website.auth.shellSubtitle: Join India's largest catering directory. Get verified, showcase your menus, and start receiving high-quality leads today.
website.auth.shellTestimonial: Since joining Bharat Caterers, our wedding booking rate has increased by 300%. The platform is incredibly easy to use.
website.auth.login.title: Log in to your account
website.auth.login.verifyRedirect: Enter the verification code we sent you.
website.auth.register.title: Tell us about your business
website.auth.register.subtitlePrefix: Let's start with the basics — then we'll email you a code to verify your address. Already registered?
website.auth.register.agreeOtp: By continuing you agree we'll email you a one-time code to confirm this address.
website.auth.register.verificationSent: We sent a verification code to your email
website.auth.verifyOtp.title: Verification
website.auth.verifyOtp.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to your email. Codes expire in 15 minutes — you can paste the full code.
website.auth.verifyOtp.fromLoginBanner: Finish signing in — enter the code we sent to your inbox.
website.auth.verifyOtp.resendSuccess: If this account exists and is unverified, we sent a new code.
website.auth.verifyOtp.invalidCode: Invalid or expired code. Try again or request a new code.
website.auth.verifyEmail.missingToken: Missing verification token. Open the link from your email.
website.auth.validation.nameMin2: Name must be at least 2 characters
website.auth.validation.nameMax120: Name must be at most 120 characters
website.auth.validation.businessNameMin2: Business name must be at least 2 characters
website.auth.validation.dialCodeFormat: Use 1–4 digits after + (e.g. +1, +91, +44). You can type 91 without +.
website.auth.validation.phoneMin6: Enter at least 6 digits for the local number
website.auth.validation.phoneMax14: That number is too long (max 14 digits)
website.auth.validation.passwordMin8: Password must be at least 8 characters
website.auth.validation.passwordMax128: Password must be at most 128 characters
website.auth.otp.groupAria: Verification code, 6 digits. You can paste the full code.
website.auth.otp.pasteTip: Tip: paste your 6-digit code from email — all boxes fill automatically.
website.contact.heroSubtitle: Questions about listings, partnerships, or press? Send a note — we typically reply within one business day.
website.contact.formHint: Fields marked Required help us route your enquiry faster.
website.contact.successBody: Thanks for reaching out. If you need anything else, send us another note.
website.contact.subject: Subject
website.contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help…
website.contact.preferEmailBodySuffix: and use each profile's enquiry options.
website.contact.validation.nameMin2: Name must be at least 2 characters
website.contact.validation.nameMax120: Name must be at most 120 characters
website.contact.validation.subjectMin3: Subject must be at least 3 characters
website.contact.validation.subjectMax200: Subject must be at most 200 characters
website.contact.validation.messageMin10: Message must be at least 10 characters
website.contact.validation.messageMax5000: Message must be at most 5000 characters
website.packages.title: Catering listing packages
website.packages.heroSubtitle: On a busy marketplace, a basic profile is rarely enough. These plans stack visibility, trust signals, and enquiry features so serious hosts can find you faster on Bharat Catering.
website.packages.valueTitle: Which tier is usually the best value?
website.packages.discoverSubtitle: Pick the depth of exposure that matches how aggressively you want to grow on Bharat Catering. Annual fees below are indicative — confirm current rates and inclusions with our team before purchase.
website.packages.comparisonHint: Exact quotas can change — use this table to brief our sales team.
website.packages.needHelpBody: Tell us your city mix, average guest count, and how many enquiries you want per month — we'll suggest Essential, Growth, or Premier.
website.notFound.body: The link may be outdated, or the page may have moved. Head back to the homepage or browse our catering directory to continue.
website.blog.heroSubtitle: Practical reads for hosts and planners—shortlist smarter, negotiate menus with confidence, and brief your caterer like a pro.
website.blog.loadErrorBody: Ensure the Nest API is running on port 4000 and database migrations are applied (npm run migration:run in catering-backend).
website.blog.notFoundBody: Check the URL or browse all posts.
website.blog.loadArticleErrorBody: Ensure the API is running and try again.

workspace.footer.tagline: Bharat Catering · Caterer workspace for your listing, menu, orders, and insights.
workspace.listingPreview.title: Listing preview
workspace.listingPreview.hint: How your card appears in marketplace search — grid or list view.
workspace.header.subtitles.dashboard: Listing status, quick actions, and marketplace preview.
workspace.header.subtitles.profile: Business details, services, keywords, and gallery for your public listing.
workspace.header.subtitles.menu: Categories, dishes, and pricing for enquiries and events.
workspace.header.subtitles.orders: Track enquiries, bookings, and fulfilment in one place.
workspace.header.subtitles.analytics: Views, leads, and performance insights for your catering business.
workspace.header.subtitles.onboarding: Complete your profile before submitting for marketplace review.
workspace.header.subtitles.default: Manage your catering business on Bharat Catering.
workspace.dashboard.subtitle: {business} — manage your profile, menu, orders, and insights from one place.
workspace.dashboard.status.liveMessage: Customers can find your listing in search and view your public profile.
workspace.dashboard.status.pendingMessage: Your profile was submitted and is waiting for approval before it goes public.
workspace.dashboard.status.rejectedMessage: Update your listing and submit again for another review.
workspace.dashboard.status.readyMessage: Your profile is complete. Submit it for admin review to appear in listings.
workspace.dashboard.status.inProgressMessage: Finish your listing in the editor, then submit for admin review.
workspace.dashboard.submitSuccess: Submitted for admin review. We'll notify you when your listing is live.
workspace.flashBanner.rejectedBody: Please update your business information and submit again for review. Your profile is not visible on the marketplace.
workspace.flashBanner.pendingBody: Your listing stays hidden from customers until our team approves it. You can still edit your profile while you wait.
workspace.wizard.intros.businessTitle: Tell us about your catering service
workspace.wizard.intros.businessSubtitle: Business name, location, tagline, and your story.
workspace.wizard.intros.servicesSubtitle: Guest capacity, experience, pricing — then specialties, services, and how people find you.
workspace.wizard.intros.gallerySubtitle: Upload a banner and gallery photos — strong visuals increase trust and enquiries.
workspace.wizard.intros.submitSubtitle: Confirm everything below, then submit. Your listing is not public until our team approves it.
workspace.wizard.sections.galleryHint: Upload photos of your food, setup, and previous events.
workspace.wizard.placeholders.about: Describe your catering business, your story, and what makes you unique...
workspace.wizard.placeholders.searchKeywords: Search keywords or type a phrase to add…
workspace.wizard.placeholders.searchKeywordsAlt: Search or type keywords to add…
workspace.wizard.hints.guestRange: Pick the range that best matches most of your events.
workspace.wizard.hints.priceRate: Typical starting rate — you can refine details later.
workspace.wizard.hints.servicesMultiSelect: Search by name, then tap a row to add or remove — like a compact multi-select.
workspace.wizard.hints.keywordsRich: Search suggestions from other listings, or add your own phrases — Enter or click "Add".
workspace.wizard.hints.keywordsDefault: Search suggestions from other listings, or add your own phrases — Enter or click "Add". Up to {limit} keywords only.
workspace.wizard.hints.categoriesMultiSelect: Hold Ctrl (Windows) or Cmd (Mac) to select multiple categories.
workspace.wizard.hints.servicesDefault: Search and pick services — multi-select with a clearer layout than a plain list box.
workspace.wizard.hints.bannerWide: Wide hero shown across the top of your listing.
workspace.wizard.questions.guestCapacity: How many guests can you serve?
workspace.wizard.questions.experienceHint: Rough tenure is fine — customers trust honesty.
workspace.wizard.questions.pricePerGuest: What's your average price per guest?
workspace.wizard.questions.categories: What types of catering do you specialize in?
workspace.wizard.questions.categoriesHint: Select all that apply — tap to add or remove.
workspace.wizard.questions.services: Which services do you actually provide?
workspace.wizard.questions.keywords: What should people type to find you in search?
workspace.wizard.gallery.bannerLabel: Banner — click or drag one image
workspace.wizard.gallery.bannerHint: PNG, JPG or GIF — wide ratio works best
workspace.wizard.gallery.galleryHelp: Up to {max} images (~5 MB each). The first tile adds photos (drag, drop, or click); new shots appear in the same grid. Trash removes a photo.
workspace.wizard.submitReview.title: Submit for admin review
workspace.wizard.submitReview.intro: Complete the checklist, then submit. We review every profile before it appears in caterer search and listings.
workspace.wizard.submitReview.servicesKeywordsHint: Pick services and add search keywords.
workspace.wizard.submitReview.bannerGalleryHint: Upload a banner image and add at least one gallery photo.
workspace.wizard.submitReview.stepYouSubmitDetail: we save your profile and mark it as pending review (not visible to customers yet).
workspace.wizard.submitReview.stepAdminReviewDetai: our team checks your business details, services, and photos for quality and accuracy.
workspace.wizard.submitReview.stepGoesLiveDetail: once approved, your listing appears in marketplace search and on your public profile page.
workspace.wizard.submitReview.successToast: Submitted for admin review. Your listing will appear after approval.
workspace.wizard.visibility.liveMessage: Your listing is visible to customers searching for caterers.
workspace.wizard.visibility.pendingMessage: We received your submission. An admin will review your profile before it appears in listings.
workspace.wizard.visibility.rejectedMessage: Your last submission was not approved. Update your profile and submit again for another review.
workspace.wizard.visibility.infoMessage: When every item above is complete and you submit, our team reviews your listing before it goes live for customers.
workspace.wizard.upload.imageTooLarge: Image is too large. Use a file under 5 MB.
workspace.wizard.upload.fileTooLarge: {name} is too large. Use a file under 5 MB.
workspace.wizard.upload.sessionExpired: Session expired. Sign in again and retry the upload.
workspace.wizard.validation.businessName: Enter your business name (at least 2 characters).
workspace.wizard.validation.contactFullName: Enter the contact person’s name (at least 2 characters).
workspace.wizard.validation.aboutRequired: Describe your business so customers know what you offer.
workspace.wizard.validation.aboutMinLength: Please add a bit more detail (at least {min} characters).
workspace.wizard.validation.capacityGuestMin: Enter a whole number of guests (1 or more), or leave blank.
workspace.wizard.validation.capacityGuestMax: Enter a whole number of guests (1 or more), or leave blank.
workspace.wizard.validation.capacityRange: Minimum guests cannot be greater than maximum.
workspace.wizard.validation.priceFrom: Enter a valid price (0 or higher).
workspace.wizard.validation.yearsInBusiness: Enter whole years (0–120), or leave blank.
workspace.wizard.validation.guestServe: Choose how many guests you can typically serve.
workspace.wizard.validation.guestServeCustom: Enter minimum and maximum guests, or pick a range above.
workspace.wizard.validation.experience: Tell us how experienced you are.
workspace.wizard.validation.experienceCustom: Enter years in business, or choose an option above.
workspace.wizard.validation.priceTier: Choose a typical price level or enter your own rate.
workspace.wizard.validation.priceTierCustom: Enter your average price per guest (INR).
workspace.wizard.validation.keywords: Add at least one search keyword.
workspace.wizard.validation.bannerRequired: Add a banner image for your listing.
workspace.wizard.validation.bannerInvalid: Use an https URL or upload an image (PNG, JPG, GIF, WebP).
workspace.wizard.validation.galleryRequired: Add at least one gallery photo.
workspace.wizard.validation.galleryPhotoInvalid: Photo {index}: use https URLs or uploaded images (PNG, JPG, GIF).
workspace.wizard.validation.sessionExpired: Session expired. Sign in again and continue setup.
workspace.modules.menu.title: Menu management
workspace.modules.menu.description: Organise categories, dishes, packages, and pricing from one place when you upgrade to Premium.
workspace.modules.orders.title: Orders
workspace.modules.orders.description: Track incoming enquiries, quotes, and confirmed events in your workspace with Premium.
workspace.modules.analytics.title: Analytics
workspace.modules.analytics.description: See profile views, leads, and listing performance with dashboards available on Premium.
workspace.modules.premiumIncluded: This module is included in the premium workspace plan.
workspace.toast.submitSuccess: Submitted for admin review. We'll notify you when your listing is live.
